entities.name: Semantic identity
entities.context: Core belief that professional identity is meaning-based (truth of events) rather than word-based

entities.name: Professional identity

entities.name: Canonical resume
entities.context: Rejected notion that a single authoritative resume exists; replaced by multiple valid expressions

entities.name: Career coaching
entities.context: Practice that should focus on extracting stories rather than polishing documents

entities.name: AI

entities.name: Resume-writing bottleneck
entities.context: Problem eliminated when focus shifts from document polishing to story extraction

relationships.context: This is a foundational belief in Careerspan's approach to career work
Professional identity is defined in semantic terms as meaningful experiences
Career coaching should apply semantic approach by extracting stories
AI enables the shift in career coaching by handling syntactic rendering
Semantic identity framework negates the concept of a canonical resume
